meeting_title: Civ VII Test of Time — Launch Retro

exchanges.speaker: Davide Detta
exchanges.text: Quick retro on Test of Time D1–D3. Top-line first — Priya, where are we?

exchanges.speaker: Priya Iyer
exchanges.text: Strong. Review score is at 87% over the rolling 7-day window, trending up. Peak CCU hit 102,400 yesterday, which is above our 95K target. D7 cohort projection is tracking 33%+. Sentiment is the headline though — the top thread on r/civ right now is 'finally the Civ VII I wanted at launch,' and Discord engagement on the Time-Tested Civs mechanic is huge.

exchanges.speaker: Davide Detta
exchanges.text: That's the line we want in the exec roll-up. Marcus, what's the volume look like in the community channels?

exchanges.speaker: Marcus Lee
exchanges.text: Reddit threads up 3x over a normal week, Discord daily active up about 40%. The Triumphs system across the six Attributes and the reworked Victories conditions are doing most of the conversation lift — way more than the Fractal Continent map or the new Commerce screen, interestingly. Cross-platform reaction on Switch 2 and PS5 is loud too. I'm pulling a sentiment slice for the 72h window and we'll have a sentiment report by Tuesday.

exchanges.speaker: Alex Akiyama
exchanges.text: On the NA creator follow-up — Maya, where are we with assets?

exchanges.speaker: Maya Reyes
exchanges.text: We're stuck on the final hero cut for paid social. Brand committed EOD Tuesday, we still don't have it. The Time-Tested Civs multiplayer premiere is May 28 — PotatoMcWhiskey, ursagaming, Boesthius, and Quill18 doing a 4-player Fractal Continent run — so I need either the final cut by EOD tomorrow or I'm shipping our v2 cut as the pre-roll. V2 is good — not great. The Brand cut has the Time-Tested Civs Syncretism reveal moment + the Alexander free-leader unlock built in, which is what we want.

exchanges.speaker: Alex Akiyama
exchanges.text: I'll chase Brand Creative tonight and escalate to Davide if we don't have movement by morning. If we slip again we ship v2 and use the Brand cut for the Triumphs deep-dive premieres on May 30.

exchanges.speaker: Davide Detta
exchanges.text: Agreed. And on the creator schedule — I saw the note Open World split the lineup. Are we packing it into one beat or really running two days?

exchanges.speaker: Maya Reyes
exchanges.text: Two days. Time-Tested Civs multiplayer premiere May 28 (the four-player showcase), Triumphs system deep-dive solo VoDs May 30 covering all six Attributes — Militaristic, Cultural, Scientific, Economic, Diplomatic, Expansionist. Cleaner ops, two visibility spikes instead of one, and the Triumphs day gives us a single-player story for the audience that doesn't want a multiplayer entry point.

exchanges.speaker: Priya Iyer
exchanges.text: One thing for the playbook — we should write up how we handled the free-update comms here. Lead with the Time-Tested Civs + Syncretism explainer, Discord AMA in the first 24h, the FAQ post on the new Commerce screen and Advisor Council that landed before the bad-faith threads could form. The free Alexander leader unlock as the closer landed clean. It worked. Worth a case study.

exchanges.speaker: Davide Detta
exchanges.text: Yes. Global GTM team should own that — 2 week deliverable, public-facing on the internal wiki. Use Test of Time as the model for the next live-service drop.

exchanges.speaker: Alex Akiyama
exchanges.text: Last thing — the asset handoff slip is the second time in a quarter we've had Brand Creative miss a vendor deadline. We should look at workflow. Not blaming anyone, but the dependency chain is brittle.

exchanges.speaker: Davide Detta
exchanges.text: Agree. Creative Ops should audit — I want a one-pager on where the handoff broke and what changes. One week.

exchanges.speaker: Marcus Lee
exchanges.text: Last note from me — Lurkit performance quest is exceeding expectations. 8K hours watched in D1–D3, payout efficient. We should consider extending the quest window through the weekend.

extracted_tickets.title: Compile r/civ + Discord sentiment report — Test of Time first 72h
extracted_tickets.rationale: Davide asked for the 'finally the Civ VII I wanted at launch' framing in the exec roll-up. A formal sentiment slice (volume, share, top threads) makes the case stick beyond one quote.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: I'm pulling a sentiment slice for the 72h window and we'll have a sentiment report by Tuesday.

extracted_tickets.title: Draft live-service launch comms playbook — Test of Time case study
extracted_tickets.rationale: Test of Time launch comms worked end-to-end (Time-Tested Civs explainer, Discord AMA in 24h, pre-emptive FAQ). Codifying it gives the next live-service drop a model to follow.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: Lead with the Time-Tested Civs explainer, Discord AMA in the first 24h, the FAQ post that landed before the bad-faith threads could form. It worked. Worth a case study.

extracted_tickets.title: Reschedule Open World Time-Tested Civs multiplayer premiere to May 28 (PotatoMcWhiskey + ursagaming + Boesthius + Quill18); split Triumphs system deep-dive solo VoDs to May 30
extracted_tickets.rationale: Schedule shift from Open World confirmed in-call. Two beats instead of one — cleaner ops, two visibility spikes, and the Triumphs day gives single-player-leaning audiences a non-multiplayer entry point. Need confirmation routed back to Open World today.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: Two days. Time-Tested Civs multiplayer premiere May 28 (the four-player showcase), Triumphs system deep-dive solo VoDs May 30 covering all six Attributes.

extracted_tickets.title: Audit Brand Creative → vendor asset handoff workflow — why Test of Time creator brief slipped 48h
extracted_tickets.rationale: Second Brand Creative slip this quarter. Davide asked for a one-pager on where the dependency chain broke and what changes. Process risk, not a person risk.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: Creative Ops should audit — I want a one-pager on where the handoff broke and what changes. One week.

extracted_tickets.title: Lock final hero cut of Test of Time post-update trailer for paid social + Time-Tested Civs multiplayer premiere pre-roll
extracted_tickets.rationale: Open World blocked on final hero cut. If Brand Creative misses the EOD ask, ship v2 as pre-roll for the May 28 premiere and use the Brand cut for the May 30 Triumphs deep-dive premieres. Either path needs a ticket so we don't lose the asset.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: If we slip again we ship v2 and use the Brand cut for the Triumphs deep-dive premieres on May 30.

meeting_title: Borderlands 4 Story Pack 1: Mad Ellie and the Vault of the Damned — Launch Readiness Check

exchanges.speaker: Davide Detta
exchanges.text: Two days out from Mad Ellie SP1. Tomás, start with the funnel — where's the base BL4 cohort coming in?

exchanges.speaker: Tomás Vega
exchanges.text: Base BL4 D30 retention right now is 13.8%, slightly under our 14% gate but trending in the right direction WoW. Mad Ellie SP1 standalone page wishlist velocity is 1,650/day, up 18% over the last 7 days. Capsule CTR on the SP1 page is 5.4%, above our 5% benchmark. We're a green light on top-of-funnel.

exchanges.speaker: Alex Akiyama
exchanges.text: Maya, creator activation — final state?

exchanges.speaker: Maya Reyes
exchanges.text: Locked, working inside the Gamesight 1,200-creator advocacy program. The 71-creator SP1 launch tier breaks out as: Tier 1 anchor stream — Shroud, Summit1G, LIRIK, TheBurntPeanut on the Friday co-op stream covering Mad Ellie / C4SH the Rogue / Whispering Glacier, early-access build Thursday. Earned tier: 67 additional creators across YouTube, VoD, and social, each with bespoke briefs and code drops — Open World runs the Tier 1 anchor-stream production, Gamesight owns the program-of-record across all 71. @TotallyTubularJonathan in the earned tier as a marquee BL voice. Same advocacy playbook structure as the BL4 main launch — that worked, no reason to reinvent it.

exchanges.speaker: Davide Detta
exchanges.text: Daniel — paid plan?

exchanges.speaker: Daniel Okafor
exchanges.text: Launch week we're at $185K across TikTok, YouTube, and CPMStar in-game placements. CTA is 'Play Now' for the base cohort + 'Wishlist + Play' for first-time-to-Borderlands traffic. Spark Ads boost on the top 5 creator hooks goes live Sunday based on D1 performance signals.

exchanges.speaker: Tomás Vega
exchanges.text: One thing I want to flag — UTM taxonomy on the creator codes. We rebuilt the schema after Q1 and I want to be sure Gamesight is reading every creator-attributed click cleanly across the 71-creator SP1 launch tier. Hideki at Gamesight is running the audit; Jennifer Zall is in the loop on program side, Joshua Maresca on ours. Last cycle we had three broken codes that under-attributed by about 8% of the creator pool. Doing one more audit pass tomorrow.

exchanges.speaker: Alex Akiyama
exchanges.text: Add a ticket for that — Gamesight UTM audit, you own, by EOD Thursday so we're clean before launch.

exchanges.speaker: Marcus Lee
exchanges.text: On the community side — sentiment monitoring is set up. 1-hour acknowledgement SLA per the playbook. Top 5 expected complaint clusters are pre-bucketed based on the launch survey (Mad Ellie SP1 loot drop rates, mission length, the Whispering Glacier traversal mechanic, Mancubus Bloodtooth boss pacing, and the Vault Hunter Pack cosmetics monetization). We have draft responses for each ready to go.

exchanges.speaker: Davide Detta
exchanges.text: Good. And on the Vault Hunter Pack cosmetics — is the messaging clean? I don't want to relive Borderlands 3 launch week.

exchanges.speaker: Marcus Lee
exchanges.text: Cosmetics are framed as the optional Vault Hunter Pack track (also rolled into Super Deluxe Edition), not the gameplay track. Gameplay-affecting items — Mad Ellie story beats, C4SH the Rogue unlock, Whispering Glacier missions, Mancubus boss — are all in the SP1 base content. We tested the messaging on the BL4 Discord council and it landed clean.

exchanges.speaker: Alex Akiyama
exchanges.text: CPMStar — Daniel, are they briefed on the in-game placement schedule? I want the placement schedule for the sustain window locked too, not just launch.

exchanges.speaker: Daniel Okafor
exchanges.text: Launch week placements are locked. Sustain window — June through August — schedule is in draft, I'll have it to CPMStar by EOD Monday.

exchanges.speaker: Davide Detta
exchanges.text: Last thing — Phase 2 paid surge is gated on D30 retention hitting 14%. If we come in under, we hold. No exceptions, no 'just push 10% more,' no 'one more weekend.' Discipline.

exchanges.speaker: Tomás Vega
exchanges.text: Understood. We'll have the D30 read for the launch cohort by June 25-ish. Plan a review the week of June 22.

extracted_tickets.title: Confirm Gamesight Mad Ellie SP1 71-creator launch tier final-locked + briefs out (Open World Tier 1 anchor stream sub-vendor)
extracted_tickets.rationale: 71-creator SP1 launch tier is a subset of Gamesight's 1,200-creator BL4 advocacy program. Tier 1 anchor stream (Shroud, Summit1G, LIRIK, TheBurntPeanut) produced by Open World gets early-access build Thursday for Friday co-op stream covering Mad Ellie / C4SH the Rogue / Whispering Glacier. 67 earned-tier creators need bespoke briefs + code drops same window — @TotallyTubularJonathan marquee. Final lock confirmation has to be routed before EOD Wednesday or the build delivery slips. Jennifer Zall (Gamesight) + Joshua Maresca (2K) co-own program governance.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: Tier 1 anchor stream — Shroud, Summit1G, LIRIK, TheBurntPeanut on the Friday co-op stream covering Mad Ellie / C4SH the Rogue / Whispering Glacier, early-access build Thursday.

extracted_tickets.title: Validate Mad Ellie SP1 Steam capsule hits ≥5% CTR benchmark on launch day
extracted_tickets.rationale: Capsule sitting at 5.4% in pre-launch traffic. Launch day will be a different traffic mix — high-intent BL4 base + cold BL-curious. Need a post-launch read by EOD launch day to confirm we're holding the benchmark and to authorize the planned A/B on capsule v2 if not.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: Capsule CTR on the SP1 page is 5.4%, above our 5% benchmark.

extracted_tickets.title: Gamesight UTM audit on all Mad Ellie SP1 creator codes — pre-launch (cc Jennifer Zall, Joshua Maresca)
extracted_tickets.rationale: Tomás flagged last cycle had 3 broken creator codes that under-attributed 8% of the pool. UTM schema was rebuilt in Q1 — one more audit pass before launch traffic hits is cheap insurance vs. losing creator-level ROI data we can't recover after the fact.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: Last cycle we had three broken codes that under-attributed by about 8% of the creator pool. Doing one more audit pass tomorrow.

extracted_tickets.title: Sentiment monitoring plan — Mad Ellie SP1 launch first 72h, 1hr ack SLA, top-5 complaint clusters pre-bucketed
extracted_tickets.rationale: Sentiment Defense playbook calls for sub-1-hour ack on anything material. Top 5 expected complaint clusters (loot drop rates, mission length, new traversal, boss pacing, SP1 cosmetics) already pre-bucketed with draft responses. Ticket formalizes the SLA and owners.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: Sentiment monitoring is set up. 1-hour acknowledgement SLA per the playbook. Top 5 expected complaint clusters are pre-bucketed based on the launch survey.

extracted_tickets.title: Brief CPMStar on Mad Ellie SP1 in-game placement schedule for sustain window (June–Aug, Whispering Glacier endgame content beat)
extracted_tickets.rationale: Launch week placements are locked. Sustain window June–August schedule is in draft, Daniel committed to deliver to CPMStar by EOD Monday. Ticket to track the handoff so we don't lose the window.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: Sustain window — June through August — schedule is in draft, I'll have it to CPMStar by EOD Monday.

meeting_title: Mafia: The Old Country — NA Sustain Strategy

exchanges.speaker: Tomás Vega
exchanges.text: ROAS is down 22% WoW on the Q2 sustain push. 1.87 against a 2.4 target. CPI drifted from $9.50 to $10.80. Funnel below the click is fine — D30 holds at 14.1%. This is creative fatigue, top of funnel.

exchanges.speaker: Daniel Okafor
exchanges.text: Heaven has three new creative concepts in QA. We were planning a refresh next quarter, but we should accelerate. Three days to QA-clear, two days to traffic split test, GO/NO-GO June 1.

exchanges.speaker: Alex Akiyama
exchanges.text: Recommend we hold the next $120K tranche until then — flagging for your call. No more spend against current creatives if you agree.

exchanges.speaker: Davide Detta
exchanges.text: Agreed. Hold the tranche, GO/NO-GO June 1 on the refresh. And let's do a post-mortem on the original launch creatives — what made them tire faster than the Mafia 2 era launch creatives? May tell us something about the messaging.

exchanges.speaker: Daniel Okafor
exchanges.text: I can pull the cohort fatigue curves on both. Worth comparing.

extracted_tickets.title: Coordinate Mafia: TOC $120K paid tranche hold pending Davide GO/NO-GO June 1
extracted_tickets.rationale: ROAS down 22% WoW with funnel fine — pure creative fatigue. Davide approved the recommendation to hold. Coordinate Heaven pause + package refresh review for June 1 call.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: Recommend we hold the next $120K tranche until then — flagging for your call.

extracted_tickets.title: Compare cohort fatigue curves — Mafia: TOC launch creatives vs Mafia 2 launch creatives
extracted_tickets.rationale: Davide asked for post-mortem on why TOC creatives tired faster than Mafia 2 era. Cohort fatigue curve comparison would tell us if it's messaging, format, or audience.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: Let's do a post-mortem on the original launch creatives — what made them tire faster than the Mafia 2 era launch creatives?

exchanges.speaker: Sarah Wu
exchanges.text: We hit a stability blocker on Glutton's Gamble Encore — crash repro on the encounter transition into the second arena. We can't ship June 5. Realistic new date is July 10.

exchanges.speaker: Alex Akiyama
exchanges.text: Five weeks. That's significant. 65K standalone-page wishlisters will get a Steam notification the moment we update the page.

exchanges.speaker: Marcus Lee
exchanges.text: Sentiment Defense playbook: pre-empt the bad-faith framing. We post a 'why we're delaying, what we're shipping instead' note that leads with the stability work — not the slip. Move the planned paid surge to align with July.

exchanges.speaker: Alex Akiyama
exchanges.text: Open World creator briefs need to re-cut for the new date. Let me own that. Comms post drafted EOD Friday.

extracted_tickets.title: Draft Wonderlands DLC delay community comms post — quality-led framing per Sentiment Defense
extracted_tickets.rationale: 65K standalone-page wishlisters will be notified by Steam on date update. Lead with the stability work and player experience win, not the slip. Drafts go to the channel Friday EOD.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: We post a 'why we're delaying, what we're shipping instead' note that leads with the stability work — not the slip.

extracted_tickets.title: Re-cut Open World creator briefs for Glutton's Gamble Encore — July 10 date
extracted_tickets.rationale: Existing creator briefs reference June 5 drop. Need re-cuts pushed before the new date hits Steam so creators have time to re-plan content schedules.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: Open World creator briefs need to re-cut for the new date. Let me own that.

exchanges.speaker: Alex Akiyama
exchanges.text: Quick lap. Civ Test of Time launched yesterday — Priya, anything we need to escalate this week?

exchanges.speaker: Priya Iyer
exchanges.text: Just the Brand Creative asset slip on the NA creator hero cut. Otherwise everything is well above gates.

exchanges.speaker: Tomás Vega
exchanges.text: Mad Ellie SP1 D30 read for the launch cohort: 9.8%. Under the 14% gate. Holding Phase 2 — flagging the Whispering Glacier endgame content beat window as the natural re-entry point if Patch 1.2 clears it.

exchanges.speaker: Marcus Lee
exchanges.text: Wonderlands DLC slips to July 10. Comms plan drafted, going through review this week.

exchanges.speaker: Alex Akiyama
exchanges.text: Risk of Rain Free Weekend kickoff prep — Lurkit brief out by Wednesday, CreatorIQ shortlist Friday.

extracted_tickets.title: Brief Lurkit on Risk of Rain Free Weekend hours-watched quest
extracted_tickets.rationale: Lurkit performance quest is the primary creator CCU lever for the Free Weekend (Aug 8–11). Brief out by Wednesday so they have runway to seed creators.
extracted_tickets.source_quote: Lurkit brief out by Wednesday, CreatorIQ shortlist Friday.
